description: A customer is returning a product they ordered by mistake. A customer service rep needs to process the return.

nodes.task_description: Find the original sales order to verify the purchase.
Create an RMA for the return, noting the reason as 'Ordered in Error'.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent generates an RMA number and return instructions for the customer.

nodes.task_description: Inform the customer that a credit will be issued once the returned item is received and inspected.

expected_outcome.expected: Agent clearly explains the return and credit process to the customer.
